descriptionText: Astondoa 43 GLX For Sale 2003 | Guest Cabins:2 | Tax PaidThe Astondoa 43 GLX For Sale 2003 offers a reassuring opportunity for anyone looking for a practical and well‑maintained flybridge cruiser from a respected European shipyard. Built in 2003 by Astondoa and currently moored in Veneto under the Italian flag, she has had only two owners and is described as being in good condition. This makes her a suitable choice for those seeking a solid and comfortable cruiser for coastal or offshore use.(Autopilot, Air conditioning, Solar panels, Generator)Specifications: • Shipyard: Astondoa • Model: Astondoa 43 GLX • Flag: Italian • Year: 2003 • Length Overall: 13.20 m • Beam: 4.20 m • Draft: 1.10 m • Displacement: 13,000 kg • Owners: 2 • Safety Certificate Expiry: 2026 • Capacity: 10 persons • CE Class: B • Location: VenetoDeck and Hull • Hull: GRP, white • Keel: GRP, V‑shaped • Teak cockpit • Complete cushion set • Bimini (cockpit and flybridge) • Window covers, sun‑shading films • Hydraulic gangwayInteriors • Cabins: 1 double, 1 twin • Berths in saloon: 2 • Toilets: 2 • Shower boxes: 2 • Galley with ceramic cooktop, oven, large fridge/freezer • Upholstery: beigeEngine and Propulsion • Engines: 2 × Volvo Penta TAMD 74EDC • Power: 430 hp each • Hours: approx. 1300 • Fuel capacity: 1200 L • Transmission: shaft • Propellers: 4‑blade • Bow thruster • Cruising speed: 24 kn • Top speed: 30 knInstruments • Autopilot • VHF • ECO • Log • Tridata • Compass • Stereo • Plotter • RadarInstallations • Voltage: 12V • Batteries: 6 AGM (660 Ah total) • Water tank: 500 L aluminium • Bilge pumps: 3 automatic • Heating • Air conditioning • Battery charger • Water heater • Fresh water tank • Black water pump • External shower • Solar panels • Generator: Mase 5 kWSafety and Docking • Tender: 3.10 m • Outboard: 15 hp • Anchor and windlass • Chain with counter and remote • Mooring lines • Life raft (revision needed) • Fenders: 6In conclusion, the Astondoa 43 GLX For Sale 2003 offers a reassuring combination of comfort, capability and steady upkeep, making her a practical choice for anyone seeking a well‑maintained flybridge cruiser. Her layout, equipment and overall condition suggest she has been cared for responsibly, and the presence of features such as twin Volvo Penta engines, air conditioning, heating, generator and solar panels makes her suitable for a variety of cruising plans. With comfortable accommodation, useful onboard systems and a dependable performance range, she stands out as a solid option for those looking for a boat ready for enjoyable Mediterranean cruising. descriptionHtml:
Astondoa 43 GLX For Sale 2003 | Guest Cabins:2 | Tax Paid

The Astondoa 43 GLX For Sale 2003 offers a reassuring opportunity for anyone looking for a practical and well‑maintained flybridge cruiser from a respected European shipyard. Built in 2003 by Astondoa and currently moored in Veneto under the Italian flag, she has had only two owners and is described as being in good condition. This makes her a suitable choice for those seeking a solid and comfortable cruiser for coastal or offshore use.

(Autopilot, Air conditioning, Solar panels, Generator)

Specifications:
• Shipyard: Astondoa
• Model: Astondoa 43 GLX
• Flag: Italian
• Year: 2003
• Length Overall: 13.20 m
• Beam: 4.20 m
• Draft: 1.10 m
• Displacement: 13,000 kg
• Owners: 2
• Safety Certificate Expiry: 2026
• Capacity: 10 persons
• CE Class: B
• Location: Veneto

Deck and Hull
• Hull: GRP, white
• Keel: GRP, V‑shaped
• Teak cockpit
• Complete cushion set
• Bimini (cockpit and flybridge)
• Window covers, sun‑shading films
• Hydraulic gangway

Interiors
• Cabins: 1 double, 1 twin
• Berths in saloon: 2
• Toilets: 2
• Shower boxes: 2
• Galley with ceramic cooktop, oven, large fridge/freezer
• Upholstery: beige

Engine and Propulsion
• Engines: 2 × Volvo Penta TAMD 74EDC
• Power: 430 hp each
• Hours: approx. 1300
• Fuel capacity: 1200 L
• Transmission: shaft
• Propellers: 4‑blade
• Bow thruster
• Cruising speed: 24 kn
• Top speed: 30 kn

Instruments
• Autopilot
• VHF
• ECO
• Log
• Tridata
• Compass
• Stereo
• Plotter
• Radar

Installations
• Voltage: 12V
• Batteries: 6 AGM (660 Ah total)
• Water tank: 500 L aluminium
• Bilge pumps: 3 automatic
• Heating
• Air conditioning
• Battery charger
• Water heater
• Fresh water tank
• Black water pump
• External shower
• Solar panels
• Generator: Mase 5 kW

Safety and Docking
• Tender: 3.10 m
• Outboard: 15 hp
• Anchor and windlass
• Chain with counter and remote
• Mooring lines
• Life raft (revision needed)
• Fenders: 6

In conclusion, the Astondoa 43 GLX For Sale 2003 offers a reassuring combination of comfort, capability and steady upkeep, making her a practical choice for anyone seeking a well‑maintained flybridge cruiser. Her layout, equipment and overall condition suggest she has been cared for responsibly, and the presence of features such as twin Volvo Penta engines, air conditioning, heating, generator and solar panels makes her suitable for a variety of cruising plans. With comfortable accommodation, useful onboard systems and a dependable performance range, she stands out as a solid option for those looking for a boat ready for enjoyable Mediterranean cruising. Contact us for more information or to book your viewing!
